arts.ttl: ‘Very difficult desire’ – Acceptance snatching player from West Brom isn’t going to be easy
arts.sum: Famalicão remain interested in signing Uros Racic from West Bromwich Albion, but accept he is a ‘very difficult desire’ for them. That’s according to Record, who say the Portuguese side would be happy to bring him back to the club this month if they can. arts.ttl: Transfer gossip: Portsmouth on trail of free-scoring teen ace eyed by West Ham and Brighton
arts.sum: Pompey are weighing up a move for Celtic teen hitman Daniel Cummings, according to reports.
